calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Defendant Dairyland Produce Llc To Provide Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Requests For Production, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Jonathan H. Davidi
Off Calendar Mar-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Tyler Paboojian Esq. 310-477-1700 Panish Shea Ravipudi for Plaintiff. (In-person)
Saleem Belbahri Esq. 628-253-5070 Tyson & Mendes for Defendant.

ARGUED.
Mr. Paboojian presents arguments; contests sanctions, late opposition, states timelines, deficient responses.
Mr. Belbahri requests to adopt the TR
Court comments and poses questions.
After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling on the motion. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $1800.00.

Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Plaintiff's Request for Production, Set One is GRANTED. Plaintiff's Request for Monetary Sanctions is Granted.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)
